summary.coverage_warning: AminoChain coverage is extremely thin: 174 specimens but only 3 donors from a single organization. The specimen-to-donor ratio suggests bulk tissue sections from 3 explant livers, not a diverse cohort. Ground truth weight is LOW for this bundle — academic sources (KUMC, MGH NAFLD, Edinburgh/Bristol liver biobanks) are expected to be the primary valid finds.

organizations.name: ProteoGenex
organizations.address: 460 Hindry Ave, Unit A, Inglewood CA, 90301 USA
organizations.description: ProteoGenex is an established innovative provider of human biological specimens and clinical information of the highest quality.

coverage_gaps.etiology: not annotated in AminoChain data — critical query requirement; requires direct inquiry to ProteoGenex
coverage_gaps.fibrosis_stage_METAVIR: partially present (63% with staging-like data) but METAVIR F4 confirmation requires pathology review
coverage_gaps.explant_vs_biopsy: source procedure not annotated — requires direct inquiry
coverage_gaps.consent_scope: not available in specimen data — requires direct inquiry
coverage_gaps.donor_pool_diversity: only 3 donors — 174 specimens likely represent multiple sections from 3 explant livers, not 174 independent cases

expected_academic_sources: KUMC liver biobank (Krishnamurthy et al.) — NASH/NAFLD FFPE cohort
MGH NAFLD cohort — biopsy-proven NASH with METAVIR staging
Edinburgh/Bristol liver biobanks — alcoholic and viral hepatitis cohorts
NIDDK NASH CRN — largest US biopsy-proven NASH registry
European NAFLD Registry — multi-site FFPE and frozen liver biopsy
academic_ground_truth_note.eval_weight: Academic finds should be weighted equally to or above AminoChain for this bundle given the thin AminoChain donor pool
